DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF IOANA POP, GHEORGHE-GAVRIL POP'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, AND FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND COUNSEL. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS IMPROPERLY NOTICED. THE MOTION WAS FILED ON JANUARY 4, 2023. GIVEN THE HEARING DATE OF JANUARY 23, 2023 (CHOSEN BY PLAINTIFF), THE MOTION MUST HAVE BEEN FILED NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 28, 2022. CAL. CIV. PROC. CODE 1005(B). FURTHERMORE, GIVEN THAT IT WAS SERVED BY MAIL, IT SHOULD HAVE BEEN FILED AND SERVED FIVE CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE DECEMBER 28, 2022 TO AFFORD APPROPRIATE NOTICE. ID. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED, AS IT WAS UNSUPPORTED BY A DECLARATION, WHICH IS REQUIRED FOR SUCH AN AWARD. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT TO JPDEOL@DHILLONLAW.COM. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JPDEOL@DHILLONLAW.COM IN WORD FORMAT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHN-PAUL DEOL, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Requests For Admission, Request For Production, And Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
MATTHEW SCHAUER, ESQ. (650) 259-9670 SIEGWART GERMAN AMERICAN LAW, INC.for Plaintiff.
Jessica Sauber, Esq. 949-756-9050 Peitho Law APC for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Plainitff informs the Court he is not pursuing the motion since they are close to settling the matter. Ms. Sauber submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IOANA POP, GHEORGHE-GAVRIL POP's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Requests For Admission, Request For Production, And Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Counsel.

The motion is denied as improperly noticed. The motion was filed on January 4, 2023. Given the hearing date of January 23, 2023 (chosen by Plaintiff), the motion must have been filed no later than December 28, 2022. Cal. Civ. Proc. Code 1005(b). Furthermore, given that it was served by mail, it should have been filed and served five calendar days before December 28, 2022 to afford appropriate notice. Id. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied, as it was unsupported by a declaration, which is required for such an award. Defendant's counsel to submit a proposed order in Word format to jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com in word format.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
